nodes.label: Home Screen — Active Session State (Bottom Sections)
nodes.description: Home tab in active session state. Shows 'SESIÓN ACTIVA' badge, motivational headline 'Estás en la zona. El ruido está fuera. Tu mente, dentro.', circular countdown timer (13:40 recovered / 46:20 remaining), 'Finalizar sesión' button, 'Sin apps protegidas / Activar' CTA, 'Tu ritual de hoy' section with 'Configurar rutinas del ritual', and 'Mi aprendizaje del día' section. Mentex Tweaks panel visible.

nodes.label: Active Session Circular Countdown Timer
nodes.description: Circular progress ring timer showing '13:40' (tiempo recuperado) and 'quedan 46:20'. Teal/green accent color. Used in Home active session state. Subtitle: 'de 60 min · 13 min de claridad'.

nodes.label: Tu Ritual de Hoy Section
nodes.description: 'Tu ritual de hoy' section shown in Home active state. Subtitle: 'Sin rutinas — agrega las que quieres practicar'. CTA card: 'Configurar rutinas del ritual — Meditación, respiración, movimiento y más'.

nodes.label: Mi Aprendizaje del Día Section
nodes.description: 'Mi aprendizaje del día' section shown below ritual section. Subtitle: 'Agrega contenido de Explorar para esta sesión'. Empty state placeholder.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Dev Panel
nodes.description: Developer/debug panel overlaid on the right side of the screen. Sections: AUTH (DEV) with shortcuts (Reset auth → Welcome, Welcome skip splash, Login screen), ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo), ACENTO color principal toggle, ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano segmented control), TIPOGRAFÍA family (Geist/Inter/Manrope segmented control).

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Panel — Shared Dev Tool
nodes.description: Developer debug/configuration panel that appears as an overlay on the right side of the screen across multiple screens. Controls: AUTH (DEV) navigation shortcuts, ESTADO home state toggle (Inactivo/Activo), ACENTO color principal, ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA (Geist/Inter/Manrope). Used for rapid iteration on design and state during development.

nodes.label: Home Screen Active Session State
nodes.description: App state where a focus session is in progress. Home screen shows session badge, countdown timer, finalizar button, ritual and learning sections. IA tab shows session-aware context summary and quick-action chips.
